product_segments.name: Data Center
product_segments.source: Q4 FY2026 earnings call transcript; Macrotrends

management_guidance.context: Guidance for Q1 FY2027, excludes China Data Center compute revenue (Q4 FY2026 earnings call)
Higher R&D and AI productivity tool usage (Q1 FY2027 earnings transcript)
Down from previous 17%-19% guidance due to geographic mix changes (Q1 FY2027 earnings transcript)

management_guidance.metric: Annual AI Infrastructure Build by End of Decade
management_guidance.context: Management estimate of market opportunity (Q3 FY2026 earnings call transcript)

competitive_position.market_share: 86% of AI accelerator market in 2025, unchanged from 2024; broader range 85%-92%
competitive_position.moat: Dominant position in AI accelerators, full-stack design, annual product cadence, and strong performance leadership.
competitive_position.threats: Big tech rivals entering AI chip territory and competitive pressure from AMD and Intel.

key_facts.fact: Q4 FY2026 record revenue of $68.13B, up 73% YoY; Data Center revenue $62.31B, up 75% YoY; Networking revenue $10.98B, up 263% YoY.
FY2026 annual revenue $215.9B, up 65% YoY; GAAP gross margin 71.1%; operating income $130.4B; diluted EPS $4.90.
Q1 FY2027 (quarter ending April 30, 2026) revenue $81.615B, up 85.23% YoY.
Institutional ownership: 65.3% of NVIDIA shares held by institutional investors; 3.9% by insiders.

analyst_thesis.bull_case: NVIDIA dominates AI/Data Center market with 86% share, strong free cash flow, and Q1 FY2027 revenue growing 85% YoY to $81.6B. Consensus price targets $275-$325 imply 30-54% upside from $211.14.
analyst_thesis.bear_case: Competition from AMD, Intel, and big tech may erode market share; growth is slowing relative to earlier surge; geopolitical risks and potential margin compression.

key_institutions.thesis: Implies ~8% gain from current price based on Q4 FY2026 results.

data_quality.notes: Segment revenue data from Macrotrends and earnings call; guidance from Q4 FY2026 and Q1 FY2027 transcripts; competitive data from multiple articles.
